/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/SimpleBankSystem.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleBankSystem.dir/src/Account.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleBankSystem.dir/src/User.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleBankSystem.dir/src/Transaction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleBankSystem.dir/src/Loan.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleBankSystem.dir/src/Database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleBankSystem.dir/src/Application.cpp.o -o SimpleBankSystem  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so
